name: Metabase
description: Query PushPress data and pull live metrics

instructions:
To get a Metabase API key:
  1. Open Slack → #support-data
  2. Send this message:
       "Hi @data I need a metabase API key for Claude Cowork.
        Can you send me one?"
     💬 https://pushpress.slack.com/channels/support-data
  3. The data team will create a key and send it to you via 1Password.

env.credential_prompt: Paste your Metabase API key (or Enter to skip):
